# Mini-AGI

> Mini-AGI is a compact artificial general intelligence for team workflows: incoming work signals become decisions, tasks, and project memory with human review before final actions.

Canonical site: https://nurgisa-labs.github.io/Mini-AGI
Languages: Kazakh, Russian, and English
Last updated: 2026-07-23

## Core positioning

Mini-AGI helps teams stop losing decisions across meetings, files, links, documents, tasks, and incoming work. The public site uses a focused dark terminal/CLI interface with an optional light mode. The offer is a practical 7-day pilot around one real work stream, not a generic AI chatbot.

1. Capture an incoming signal.
2. Link it to project context, people, prior decisions, and constraints.
3. Prepare a draft note, task, answer, or next step.
4. Mark sources and risks before external action.
5. Keep human review for clients, money, publication, legal, and final decisions.
6. Save confirmed decisions back into project memory.

## Target audience

- Teams working across meetings, documents, tasks, and messengers.
- Operators who need a source-grounded memory and explicit review gates.
- Teams starting with one repeatable work stream before expanding.

## Smart devices

Mini-AGI also develops verifiable smart devices around one real task. The engineering loop can combine Raspberry Pi, Arduino or ESP hardware, embedded software, local AI logic, external integrations and a 3D-printed enclosure. The first public case is a multisensor presence detector marked as a pilot in development, not a finished serial product.

## Important topics

- Mini-AGI
- compact artificial general intelligence
- мини искусственный общий интеллект
- шағын жасанды жалпы интеллект
- рабочий контур с ИИ
- жобалық жад
- project memory
- Telegram/WhatsApp incoming work
- agent drafts
- source checking
- human review
- decisions → memory

- `/Mini-AGI/en/` — English main landing page.
- `/Mini-AGI/en/contact/` — English contact fallback page.

- `/Mini-AGI/blog/` — Russian Mini-AGI notes index.
- `/Mini-AGI/blog/kuda-ukhodyat-resheniya-posle-vstrech/` — practical article on keeping meeting decisions in the working loop.
- `/Mini-AGI/blog/s-chego-nachat-pilot-mini-agi/` — practical article on selecting the first Mini-AGI work stream for a seven-day pilot.

## What Mini-AGI is not

Mini-AGI is not marketed as a fully autonomous replacement for specialists. Agents prepare context-aware work; people review, approve, and own final decisions.

## Contact

Primary Telegram: https://t.me/nurgisa_andasbekov (`@nurgisa_andasbekov`). If the link does not open, search for the handle in Telegram and send the short process description from the contact page.
